_publications._publicationTitle: Unraveling the development of cutaneous neurofibromas in neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: Mutant nerves showed a higher proportion of nmSCs (MBP⁻,Tom⁺), whereas the proportion of mSCs (MBP⁺,Tom⁺) remained unchanged compared to controls
details: Mutant nerves showed higher proportion of non-myelinating SCs (MBP⁻,Tom⁺) while myelinating SCs proportion remained unchanged
